15,000+ATTENDEES

$75,000+PRIZE POOL

ABOUT THE ODYSSEY

TECHFEST 2026 is the ultimate galactic platform for technologists, engineers, and dreamers to collaborate on building the digital and spatial frontiers of humanity.

Bridging Today and 2050

Over the course of three action-packed days, delegates will explore groundbreaking technologies through a hybrid array of tech panels, research showcases, hacking sessions, and cosmic exhibits.

Our mission is to foster innovation that transcends standard planetary limits. Join us on this journey as we program the quantum circuits and align the stellar trajectories of our digital future.

Neural Architectures

Dive deep into synthetic intelligence, neural engineering, and advanced cognitive systems shaping tomorrow.

Interstellar Space Tech

Explore space propulsion, orbit telemetry, satellite communication, and galactic navigation systems.

Cyber Security Protocol

Architect cryptographic barriers, blockchain meshes, and hyper-secure decentralization layers.

03DAYS OF INTENSITY
50+GLOBAL KEYNOTES
20+COSMIC WORKSHOPS
300+ACADEMIC SPONSORS

CHAMPIONSHIP EVENTS

Test your expertise across critical tech disciplines. Enter the digital colosseum and challenge the best minds on Earth.

ProgrammingMarch 12, 10:00 AM

CODEWARP HACKATHON

Assemble your squad, code your algorithms, and build futuristic apps in 36 hours.

CHAMPIONSHIP POOL
$10,000 Main Prize + Gadgets
RoboticsMarch 13, 01:00 PM

ROBOBRAWL DESTRUCTION

Watch custom combat robots slam, rip, and burn their way to championship victory.

CHAMPIONSHIP POOL
$8,500 Grand Prize Pool
AerospaceMarch 13, 03:00 PM

AERODESIGN ORBIT

Design autonomous solar gliders to complete high-altitude payloads and precision landings.

CHAMPIONSHIP POOL
$6,000 + Flight Simulator Passes
FintechMarch 14, 11:00 AM

ALGORITHMIC TRADING DUAL

Deploy high-frequency market strategies against automated market cycles in a real-time sim.

CHAMPIONSHIP POOL
$5,000 + Quant Internship Offers

COSMIC WORKSHOPS

Deep dive into technical training led by pioneering developers. Get certified in frontier software frameworks.

March 12, 02:00 PM (3 Hours)
01

GENERATIVE AI MODEL DESIGN

Led by Dr. Alicia Vance // Synthetix Labs
PyTorchLLMsTransformers

Architect custom attention mechanisms, optimize neural weight mappings, and deploy scaled transformer checkpoints locally.

SEATS RESTRICTED
March 13, 10:00 AM (4 Hours)
02

QUANTUM HARDWARE PROGRAMMING

Led by Marcus Brody // Qubit Corp
QiskitSuperconducting GatesError Correction

Implement entanglement circuits, configure phase gates, and run noise mitigation routines on live quantum simulations.

SEATS RESTRICTED
March 14, 02:00 PM (3 Hours)
04

SECURE DECENTRALIZED PROTOCOLS

Led by Sarah Jenkins // Web3 Foundation
RustZero Knowledge ProofsWASM

Construct zero-knowledge verification nodes, write optimized Rust smart contracts, and deploy on modular networks.

SEATS RESTRICTED
01 / 04

Real-time evaluation standings of ongoing team projects. Watch the metrics update as final evaluations commence.

GRAND CHAMPIONSHIP

Top teams compete for funding, engineering sponsorships, and hardware support.

MISSION TIMELINE

Follow the chronological progress of the events, panels, and championships.

DAY 1 // COMMENCEMENTMARCH 12, 09:00 AM

KEYNOTE ODYSSEY: FIRST FLIGHT

Opening declarations from futuristic visionaries, launching the 36-hour CodeWarp hackathon, and booting the server clusters.

DAY 2 // MIDPOINTMARCH 13, 01:00 PM

ROBOBRAWL AND TECH PANELS

Robot combat qualifying matches, high-altitude drone payloads, and industry panels debating neural interfaces.

DAY 3 // CONCLUSIONMARCH 14, 04:00 PM

FINAL PITCH & AWARDS NIGHT

Top hackathon teams present to quantum investors, final robotic tournament champions declared, and modular synth afterparty.

MISSION PARTNERS

Collaborating with global corporations leading the futuristic technology race.
